attach-zugferd-xml-to-pdf.title: Attach ZUGFeRD XML to PDF and Convert to PDF/A‑3B
attach-zugferd-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a ZUGFeRD XML invoice into a PDF as an attached file with the correct AFRelationship and then convert the PDF to PDF/A‑3B using Aspose.Pdf.

create-zugferd-compliant-invoice-pdf.title: Create ZUGFeRD‑Compliant Invoice PDF
create-zugferd-compliant-invoice-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF invoice template, embed ZUGFeRD XML data, and convert the document to a PDF/A‑3 ZUGFeRD‑compliant PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-zugferd-pdf.title: Validate ZUGFeRD PDF with Aspose.Pdf
validate-zugferd-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF that contains ZUGFeRD data and validate it against the ZUGFeRD specification, outputting a validation log.

extract-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.title: Extract ZUGFeRD XML from PDF
extract-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate and extract the ZUGFeRD XML attachment embedded in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with fallback handling for different library versions.

update-zugferd-xml-attachment.title: Update ZUGFeRD XML Attachment in PDF
update-zugferd-xml-attachment.description: Shows how to replace the embedded ZUGFeRD XML file in a PDF with a new version using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-zugferd-attachment-from-pdf.title: Remove ZUGFeRD Attachment from PDF
remove-zugferd-attachment-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate and delete a ZUGFeRD embedded file from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping the rest of the document intact.

add-custom-metadata-to-zugferd-pdf.title: Add Custom Metadata to ZUGFeRD PDF
add-custom-metadata-to-zugferd-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing ZUGFeRD PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add custom metadata entries such as project code and department, and save the updated document.

encrypt-zugferd-pdf-with-passwords.title: Encrypt ZUGFeRD PDF with User and Owner Passwords
encrypt-zugferd-pdf-with-passwords.description: Shows how to load a ZUGFeRD PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with separate user and owner passwords, set permissions, and save the encrypted file.

digitally-sign-zugferd-pdf-with-timestam.title: Digitally Sign a ZUGFeRD PDF with Timestamp
digitally-sign-zugferd-pdf-with-timestam.description: Demonstrates adding a PKCS#7 digital signature and a trusted timestamp to a ZUGFeRD PDF using a PFX certificate.

add-document-expiry-javascript-action.title: Add Document-Level JavaScript Expiry Action to PDF
add-document-expiry-javascript-action.description: Demonstrates how to embed a document-level JavaScript action that checks an expiry date and closes the PDF when opened.

add-js-open-action-navigate-page-10.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to Navigate to Page 10
add-js-open-action-navigate-page-10.description: Demonstrates how to embed a JavaScript open action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so the viewer automatically jumps to page 10 when the document is opened.

add-page-level-javascript-alert-to-pdf.title: Add Page-Level JavaScript Alert to PDF
add-page-level-javascript-alert-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a page-level JavaScript action that shows an alert when a specific PDF page is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.

calculate-total-order-amount-pdf.title: Calculate Total Order Amount from PDF Form Fields
calculate-total-order-amount-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF form fields, sum line‑item values, and write the calculated total back into a form field using Aspose.Pdf.

add-auto-save-javascript-to-pdf.title: Add Auto‑Save JavaScript to PDF
add-auto-save-javascript-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a document‑level JavaScript action that automatically saves the PDF at defined intervals using Aspose.Pdf.

draw-custom-star-shape.title: Draw Custom Star Shape with PDF Operators
draw-custom-star-shape.description: Demonstrates how to use low‑level PDF operators in Aspose.Pdf to draw a 5‑pointed star at specific coordinates, including setting fill and stroke colors and line width.

update-line-width-operators.title: Update Line Width Operators from 1pt to 3pt in PDF
update-line-width-operators.description: Creates a PDF with a 1‑point line, scans the page content for SetLineWidth operators, changes widths equal to 1 point to 3 points, and saves the result.

delete-specific-pdf-operators.title: Delete Specific PDF Operators from Page Content
delete-specific-pdf-operators.description: Shows how to remove unwanted operators from a PDF page's content stream using Aspose.Pdf's OperatorCollection.

replace-text-using-showtext-operators.title: Replace Text in PDF Using ShowText Operators
replace-text-using-showtext-operators.description: Shows how to scan each page's operator collection for ShowText operators and replace a target string with a new value using Aspose.Pdf.

create-bar-chart-pdf-custom-colors.title: Create Bar Chart in PDF with Custom Colors and Axis Labels
create-bar-chart-pdf-custom-colors.description: This example shows how to generate a bar chart inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Graph API, applying custom fill colors, axis lines, tick marks, and labels.

create-line-graph-different-stroke-style.title: Create Line Graph with Different Stroke Styles in PDF
create-line-graph-different-stroke-style.description: Shows how to add a Graph to a PDF and draw three lines with solid, dashed, and dotted stroke styles using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-vector-graphic-into-pdf.title: Embed Vector Graphic (Graph) into PDF Page
embed-vector-graphic-into-pdf.description: Shows how to create a Graph container, add rectangle and line shapes, and embed the resulting vector graphic directly onto a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

combine-multiple-graphs-2x2-pdf.title: Combine Multiple Graphs on a Single PDF Page
combine-multiple-graphs-2x2-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place four Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Graph objects in a 2×2 grid on one PDF page, adding a simple shape and a title to each graph.

add-file-attachment-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment Annotation to PDF
add-file-attachment-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external PDF file to a PDF document as a file attachment annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.title: Attach Multiple Files to a PDF with Descriptions
attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add several file attachment annotations to a PDF, each with its own MIME type (documented), description, and icon using Aspose.Pdf.

list-pdf-attachments-sizes.title: List PDF Attachments and Their Sizes
list-pdf-attachments-sizes.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enumerate all embedded file attachments, and output each attachment's name and size in bytes.

remove-specific-attachment-from-pdf.title: Remove Specific Attachment from PDF
remove-specific-attachment-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a particular embedded file from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping other attachments intact.

update-pdf-attachment-description.title: Update PDF Attachment Description
update-pdf-attachment-description.description: Demonstrates embedding a file attachment in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and then updating its description to reflect the latest version before saving.

set-pdf-metadata-and-custom-property.title: Set PDF Metadata and Custom Property
set-pdf-metadata-and-custom-property.description: Shows how to load a PDF, assign Title and Author metadata, add a custom property for the invoice number, and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.

read-custom-pdf-metadata-audit.title: Read Custom PDF Metadata and Write Audit Log
read-custom-pdf-metadata-audit.description: The example opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracts only custom metadata entries, and writes them to a log file for auditing purposes.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-user-owner-password.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Set User/Owner Passwords
encrypt-pdf-aes256-user-owner-password.description: Demonstrates how to apply AES‑256 encryption to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, specifying both user and owner passwords and configuring document permissions.

encrypt-pdf-print-only-permission.title: Encrypt PDF with Print‑Only Permission
encrypt-pdf-print-only-permission.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf so that only printing is allowed while content copying and annotation modifications are disabled.

verify-pdf-digital-signatures.title: Verify PDF Digital Signatures and Retrieve Signer Details
verify-pdf-digital-signatures.description: Demonstrates detecting compromised signatures, verifying each PDF signature (basic and strict), and extracting signer information using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-layout.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Layout Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-layout.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf while preserving the original layout, fonts, and tables.

convert-pdf-to-html-embedded-images.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Base64 Images
convert-pdf-to-html-embedded-images.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a single HTML document using Aspose.Pdf, embedding raster images as Base64‑encoded PNGs inside SVG wrappers and embedding all resources into the HTML.

convert-pdf-page-to-high-res-png.title: Convert PDF Page to High-Resolution PNG
convert-pdf-page-to-high-res-png.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, selecting the first page, and rendering it to a 300 DPI PNG image.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images
batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg.description: Demonstrates how to convert every page of each PDF file in a folder to separate JPEG images using Aspose.PDF, naming the output files after the source PDF.

export-selected-pdf-pages.title: Export Selected PDF Pages to Separate Files
export-selected-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a PDF and save each page as an individual PDF file, preserving the original page size and orientation.

merge-multiple-pdfs-with-bookmarks.title: Merge Multiple PDFs with Bookmarks Preserved
merge-multiple-pdfs-with-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates merging several PDF files into a single document while keeping the original bookmarks and outline hierarchy using Aspose.Pdf.

split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.title: Split PDF into Single-Page PDFs
split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through its pages, and saving each page as a separate PDF file.

extract-text-with-line-breaks.title: Extract Text from PDF with Line Breaks Preserved
extract-text-with-line-breaks.description: Demonstrates how to extract all textual content from a PDF while preserving line breaks and spacing using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber and extraction options.

extract-embedded-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Embedded Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-embedded-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, absorb image placements, and save each embedded image in its original resolution using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Extract PDF Form Fields to JSON
extract-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Demonstrates reading fillable form fields from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and serializing the field names and values into a JSON file.

fill-pdf-form-from-json-and-flatten.title: Fill PDF Form from JSON and Flatten
fill-pdf-form-from-json-and-flatten.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import form field values from a JSON file, flatten the form to make fields read‑only, and save the resulting document.

print-pdf-to-default-printer-silently.title: Print PDF to Default Printer Silently
print-pdf-to-default-printer-silently.description: Shows how to verify a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and then send it to the default printer without displaying any print dialog by using the OS "print" verb.

print-pdf-page-range-to-network-printer.title: Print PDF Page Range to Network Printer with Duplex and Paper Size
print-pdf-page-range-to-network-printer.description: Shows how to print a selected range of PDF pages to a network printer using Aspose.Pdf, configuring duplex mode and custom paper size.

add-javascript-open-action-jump-to-page-.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to Jump to Page 5
add-javascript-open-action-jump-to-page-.description: Demonstrates how to set a JavaScript open action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so the document automatically navigates to page five when opened.

add-auto-print-javascript-action-to-pdf.title: Add Auto‑Print JavaScript Action to PDF
add-auto-print-javascript-action-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript action that automatically opens the print dialog when the PDF is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-author-dynamically.title: Set PDF Author Dynamically Using System User
set-pdf-author-dynamically.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, get the current system user name, assign it to the document's Author metadata, and save the updated file.

hide-form-field-with-checkbox-js.title: Hide Form Field with Checkbox Using JavaScript
hide-form-field-with-checkbox-js.description: Demonstrates how to add a checkbox and a text box to a PDF and use a JavaScript action to hide or show the text box based on the checkbox state.

embed-qr-code-image-low-level-operators.title: Embed QR Code Image Using Low‑Level PDF Operators
embed-qr-code-image-low-level-operators.description: Demonstrates how to add a QR code image to a specific location in a PDF by inserting low‑level graphics operators (q, cm, Do, Q) with Aspose.Pdf.

compress-images-optimize-pdf.title: Compress Images and Optimize PDF Size
compress-images-optimize-pdf.description: Shows how to reduce a PDF's file size by compressing images, limiting resolution, and removing unused objects using Aspose.Pdf optimization options.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa2b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-2b Compliance
convert-pdf-to-pdfa2b.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑2b compliance with a conversion log, and save the resulting archival‑ready file.

add-xmp-metadata-pdfa-compliance.title: Add XMP Metadata for PDF/A Compliance
add-xmp-metadata-pdfa-compliance.description: Shows how to embed required XMP metadata (DocumentID and CreatorTool) into a PDF and convert the document to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdfa-compliance-after-zugferd-a.title: Validate PDF/A Compliance After Adding ZUGFeRD Attachment
validate-pdfa-compliance-after-zugferd-a.description: The example creates a PDF, converts it to PDF/A‑2U, embeds a ZUGFeRD XML invoice as an attachment, saves the document, and validates that the resulting PDF remains PDF/A‑2U compliant.

convert-pdf-zugferd-to-pdfa3u.title: Convert PDF with ZUGFeRD Attachment to PDF/A‑3u
convert-pdf-zugferd-to-pdfa3u.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF that contains a ZUGFeRD XML attachment and converting it to PDF/A‑3u while preserving the embedded data using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-validate-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.title: Extract and Validate ZUGFeRD XML from PDF
extract-validate-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates locating an embedded ZUGFeRD XML file inside a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting it to a separate file, and validating the XML against the official ZUGFeRD XSD schema.

generate-zugferd-xml-embed-pdf-invoice.title: Generate ZUGFeRD XML and Embed into PDF Invoice
generate-zugferd-xml-embed-pdf-invoice.description: Creates a simple ZUGFeRD XML document from an order object, embeds it as an attached file in a PDF invoice using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the PDF.

batch-generate-zugferd-invoice-pdfs.title: Batch Generate ZUGFeRD-Compliant Invoice PDFs from CSV
batch-generate-zugferd-invoice-pdfs.description: Shows how to read invoice data from a CSV file, create a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, and embed the corresponding ZUGFeRD XML into each PDF.

embed-custom-font-in-pdf-graph.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font in PDF with Graph
embed-custom-font-in-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates loading a TrueType font, embedding it into a PDF, and using it together with a simple graph drawn via Aspose.Pdf.

subset-custom-font-in-pdf.title: Subset Custom Font in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
subset-custom-font-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a custom TrueType font, marking it for embedding and subsetting, adding text with that font, and subsetting all fonts to reduce the PDF file size.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences-hide-toolbar.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences via JavaScript to Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar
set-pdf-viewer-preferences-hide-toolbar.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to add an OpenAction JavaScript that hides the toolbar and menu bar when the PDF is opened.

add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-t.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Total Field
add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-t.description: Demonstrates how to embed JavaScript in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf to sum line‑item fields and display the result in a total field.

add-semi-transparent-background-watermar.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Watermark to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-background-watermar.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to place a semi-transparent watermark text behind existing page content on every page of a PDF document.

secure-pdf-form-filling-only.title: Secure PDF with Form-Filling Only Permission
secure-pdf-form-filling-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf so that only form filling is permitted while editing, printing, and content extraction are disabled.

remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF
remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all page annotations, removes any embedded JavaScript actions from link and widget annotations, and saves the cleaned document.

list-javascript-actions-in-pdf.title: List JavaScript Actions in a PDF Document
list-javascript-actions-in-pdf.description: Shows how to enumerate both document‑level and page‑level JavaScript actions in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and convert each page into a multi‑page TIFF file using a specified resolution and TIFF settings.

generate-png-thumbnails-for-pdf-pages.title: Generate PNG Thumbnails for PDF Pages
generate-png-thumbnails-for-pdf-pages.description: Creates a PNG thumbnail image for each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ThumbnailDevice and saves them to a specified folder.

batch-pdf-text-extraction-search-index.title: Batch PDF Text Extraction and In-Memory Search Index
batch-pdf-text-extraction-search-index.description: Demonstrates how to load multiple PDF files, extract their full text using Aspose.Pdf, and store the results in an in‑memory dictionary for quick keyword searches.

embed-audio-pdf-sound-annotation.title: Embed Audio in PDF with Sound Annotation and JavaScript
embed-audio-pdf-sound-annotation.description: Shows how to embed a WAV audio file into a PDF using a SoundAnnotation and add JavaScript that plays the audio automatically when the document opens.

add-encrypted-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Encrypted Attachment to PDF
add-encrypted-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a file as an attachment, encrypt the PDF (including the attachment) with user and owner passwords, and save the encrypted document.

set-pdf-creation-modification-dates.title: Set PDF Creation and Modification Dates
set-pdf-creation-modification-dates.description: Shows how to assign the current processing timestamps to a PDF's creation and modification metadata fields using Aspose.Pdf before saving the document.

draw-pie-chart-using-low-level-operators.title: Draw Pie Chart Using Low-Level PDF Operators
draw-pie-chart-using-low-level-operators.description: Demonstrates how to create a pie chart in a PDF by manually constructing slice paths and filling them with distinct colors using Aspose.Pdf low‑level operators.

convert-pdf-to-html-enhanced-antialiasin.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Enhanced Anti-Aliasing
convert-pdf-to-html-enhanced-antialiasin.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while enabling advanced anti-aliasing to produce smoother graphics.

add-javascript-password-prompt-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Password Prompt to PDF
add-javascript-password-prompt-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed JavaScript in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf to prompt the user for a password on document open, enhancing security.

create-pdf-signature-field-js-validation.title: Create PDF with Signature Field and JavaScript Validation
create-pdf-signature-field-js-validation.description: The example creates a PDF document, adds a digital signature field, and attaches JavaScript that validates the signature when the field is activated.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and export all its annotations to an XFDF file for external processing or archiving.

import-fdf-data-into-pdf-and-flatten-for.title: Import FDF Data into PDF and Flatten Form
import-fdf-data-into-pdf-and-flatten-for.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing field values from an FDF file, flattening the form to make fields static, and saving the result.

set-pdf-language-property.title: Set PDF Language Property for Accessibility
set-pdf-language-property.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, assign a primary language tag for screen readers using the TaggedContent API, optionally set a title, and save the document.

add-javascript-toggle-optional-sections.title: Add JavaScript to Toggle Optional Sections in a PDF Form
add-javascript-toggle-optional-sections.description: Demonstrates how to embed JavaScript in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf to show or hide optional fields based on a checkbox (or dropdown) selection.

create-pdf-table-of-contents.title: Create PDF Table of Contents with Clickable Headings
create-pdf-table-of-contents.description: Demonstrates how to insert a Table of Contents page into an existing PDF and add clickable heading entries that link to their respective pages using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-passwords.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and apply identical user and owner passwords with specific permissions using Aspose.Pdf.

dynamic-header-footer-pdf.title: Create PDF with Dynamic Header and Footer via JavaScript
dynamic-header-footer-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add shared form fields for a header and footer and assign JavaScript actions that update their text on each page when the PDF is opened.

add-auto-close-javascript-to-pdf.title: Add Auto‑Close JavaScript to PDF
add-auto-close-javascript-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript timeout in a PDF that automatically closes the document after a specified number of milliseconds using Aspose.Pdf.
